parameter: #   epoch_2024_scaling = Epoch AI; "Can AI scaling continue through 2030?" (2024-08-20)
#   author_synthesis   = Author synthesis from multiple cited sources
#   high   = directly cited from the linked source
#   medium = derived/synthesized but anchored to cited figures
#   low    = round-number placeholder retained from sprint 1
# Anchor: 2024 NVIDIA H100/H200 ~2M (Epoch); B200 ~0.2M; AMD MI300 ~0.15M H100e;
# TPU v5/Trillium internal Google ~0.5M H100e; Trainium ~0.1M H100e; China
# domestic ~0.3M H100e. Author synthesis ≈ 3.5M H100e in 2024.

notes: 2024 actual: NVIDIA H100/H200 ~2M (Epoch median 1.5-2M) + AMD/TPU/Trainium/China ~1.5M H100-eq.
2025 actual: B200 ramp + GB200 + AMD MI325. NVIDIA DC revenue ~$200B implies ~5M H100e; total ~6.5M H100e.
2026 projection: continued B200/GB200 ramp + Rubin in Q4 + TPU v7. ~70% YoY.
Epoch 2030 stock 20-400M H100e median 100M. With 5y lifetime base; annual shipments ~50-70M.
Slower B200 ramp due to CoWoS / HBM constraints (Epoch identifies these as primary).
Higher with Stargate-class spend pulling demand forward.
